case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. JAQUELINE BROUSSARD et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-28-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
